; reTasker: add an "Add to todos" button to the handwriting selection menu.
;
; Targets SceneSelectionHandler.qml, the lasso/circle selection overlay that
; shows cut/copy/convert/delete. We append one more ContextualMenu.Button that
; reads the on-screen selection rectangle (mapped to framebuffer pixels) and
; ships it as JSON to the native retasker-capture extension over the message
; broker, which crops the framebuffer and writes the PNG.
;
; Unhashed on purpose: Xochitl ships its QML as plaintext, so real identifiers
; match directly and we avoid a hashtab dependency.

AFFECT /qml/common/SceneSelectionHandler.qml
    IMPORT net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker 2.0

    TRAVERSE Item#selectionRoot
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            XoviMessageBroker {
                id: retaskerBroker
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE Item#selectionRoot > SelectionContextualMenu#tools
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ArkControls.ContextualMenu.Button {
                id: retaskerAddTodo
                focusPolicy: Qt.NoFocus
                type: tools.type
                visible: controller && controller.selectionContainsStroke
                iconSource: "qrc:/ark/icons/checkmark_circle"
                onClicked: {
                    const dpr = Screen.devicePixelRatio;
                    const c0 = selection.mapToItem(null, 0, 0);
                    const c1 = selection.mapToItem(null, selection.width, 0);
                    const c2 = selection.mapToItem(null, selection.width, selection.height);
                    const c3 = selection.mapToItem(null, 0, selection.height);
                    const minX = Math.min(c0.x, c1.x, c2.x, c3.x);
                    const minY = Math.min(c0.y, c1.y, c2.y, c3.y);
                    const maxX = Math.max(c0.x, c1.x, c2.x, c3.x);
                    const maxY = Math.max(c0.y, c1.y, c2.y, c3.y);
                    // In landscape, xochitl rotates the page canvas inside the
                    // portrait framebuffer. mapToItem(null) resolves through that
                    // rotation, so the bbox is correct but the cropped pixels come
                    // out turned 90 deg. Recover the rotation from how the
                    // selection's local +x axis lands in framebuffer space, and
                    // ship it so the native side can rotate the crop back upright.
                    // ROTATION DIRECTION: if landscape captures come out 180 deg
                    // off, swap the 90 and 270 below.
                    const ax = c1.x - c0.x;
                    const ay = c1.y - c0.y;
                    const rotation = Math.abs(ay) > Math.abs(ax)
                        ? (ay > 0 ? 270 : 90)
                        : (ax >= 0 ? 0 : 180);
                    const bbox = {
                        x: Math.round(minX * dpr),
                        y: Math.round(minY * dpr),
                        width: Math.round((maxX - minX) * dpr),
                        height: Math.round((maxY - minY) * dpr),
                        rotation: rotation
                    };
                    const result = retaskerBroker.sendSimpleSignal("retasker.capture", JSON.stringify(bbox));
                    print("[retasker] capture", JSON.stringify(bbox), "->", result);
                    selectionRoot.close();
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
